Menu

Gift Pokémon

From Bulbapedia, the community-driven Pokémon encyclopedia.
Jump to navigationJump to search

A gift Pokémon is a Pokémon given to a Trainer during their journey. Examples of gift Pokémon include first partner Pokémon and Pokémon Eggs.

Contents

  • 1 Gift Pokémon given by Trainers in the games
    • 1.1 Generation I
    • 1.2 Generation II
      • 1.2.1 In Pokémon Stadium 2
    • 1.3 Generation III

      • 1.8.2 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl

    • 3.1 Pokémon Adventures

    • 3.3 Pokémon Pocket Monsters series
  • 4 Related articles

Gift Pokémon given by Trainers in the games

As with wild Pokémon, gift Pokémon will have the last four moves they could have learned by level up except under extraordinary circumstances. Normally, the player is treated as the Original Trainer of gift Pokémon they receive from NPCs; however, in some particular cases, such as Webster's Spearow in Gold, Silver, Crystal, HeartGold, and SoulSilver and N's Pokémon in Black 2 and White 2, the NPC is retained as the Pokémon's Original Trainer.

Generation I

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Generation I
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Bulbasaur Professor Oak Professor Oak's Laboratory 5 Red and Blue only
First partner Pokémon
Charmander
Squirtle
Pikachu Yellow only
Player's first Pokémon
Magikarp Magikarp salesman Route 4 Pokémon Center 5 Sold for $500
Bulbasaur Unnamed Trainer Cerulean City 10 Yellow only
If Pikachu's friendship is at a high enough level (missable)
Charmander Unnamed Trainer Route 24 Yellow only
Squirtle Officer Jenny Vermilion City Yellow only
After obtaining the Thunder Badge
Eevee N/A Celadon Mansion rooftop 25 Located in an item ball on the table inside the roof room
Hitmonlee Karate master Fighting Dojo 30 After defeating the master
Choice between Hitmonlee or Hitmonchan
Hitmonchan
Lapras Silph Co. employee Silph Co. 7F 15 After defeating Blue at Silph Co.
Omanyte
Helix Fossil 		Cinnabar Lab Scientist Cinnabar Lab on Cinnabar Island 30 Fossils offered by a Super Nerd after defeating him at the end of Mt. Moon
Choice between Helix Fossil or Dome Fossil
Kabuto
Dome Fossil
Aerodactyl
Old Amber 		Old Amber received from a Pewter Museum of Science Scientist
Cut required to reach the back of the museum

Generation II

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Generation II
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Chikorita Professor Elm New Bark Town 5 First partner Pokémon
Holding a Berry
Cyndaquil
Totodile
Togepi Egg Elm's aide Violet City Pokémon Center 5
(after hatching) 		After obtaining the Zephyr Badge
True identity of the Mystery Egg
Pichu Egg Day Care Man Route 34 Day Care Center 5
(after hatching) 		Crystal only
One of seven Baby Pokémon inside the Odd Egg
Increased chance of being Shiny
Knows Dizzy Punch
(event-exclusive in the Japanese version;
available during normal gameplay in the Western versions)
Cleffa Egg
Igglybuff Egg
Tyrogue Egg
Smoochum Egg
Elekid Egg
Magby Egg
Spearow
Nicknamed Kenya 		Randy Route 35 south gate 10 Intended to be given to a man on
Route 31 in exchange for TM50 (Nightmare)
Eevee Bill Bill's house in Goldenrod City 20 After meeting Bill in Ecruteak City's Pokémon Center
Shuckle
Nicknamed Shuckie 		Mania Cianwood City 15 Intended to be returned
Dratini Master Dragon's Den 15 Crystal only
Will know ExtremeSpeed
if all questions are answered correctly
Tyrogue Kiyo Mt. Mortar B1F 10 Proof of defeating the Karate King, Kiyo

In Pokémon Stadium 2

Due to the color changing mechanic in the Pokémon Stadium series, Kenya has a specific appearance in those games. This changes for each nickname and OT name change in different languages. Shuckle obtained from English games do not change in color.

KENYA

Claw Fossil
Castform Weather Institute Scientist Weather Institute 25 After defeating Team Aqua or Team Magma
Holding a Mystic Water
Beldum Steven Steven's house in Mossdeep City 5 After entering the Hall of Fame

Reward for completing the Hoenn Pokédex

Cyndaquil
Totodile

Colosseum

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Colosseum and Pokémon XD → Pokémon Colosseum
Species Original Trainer Location Level Notes
Plusle DUKING Pyrite Town 13 Reward from Duking for rescuing Plusle*
Ho-Oh MATTLE Mt. Battle 70 Reward for defeating all 100 Trainers in Battle Mode* with a Story Mode party*
Must have purified all 48 Shadow Pokémon in Story Mode first

XD: Gale of Darkness

Shadow
Togepi 		Hordel Outskirt Stand 25+ After purification, can be traded for an Elekid*

One per completion, only one each

Totodile

Nicknamed Kenya 		Webster Route 35 south gate 20 Intended to go to a man on Route 31 to receive TM44 (Rest)
Can be kept if evolved or if the mail is on another Pokémon
Always female, IVs are 15/20/15/20/20/20*, holding Grass Mail
Eevee Bill Bill's house in Goldenrod City 5 After meeting Bill in Ecruteak City's Pokémon Center
Tentacool Unnamed NPC Cianwood City Pokémon Center 15 Given if the player has only one Pokémon in their party and none in their PC Boxes
Can be repeated indefinitely
Shuckle
Nicknamed Shuckie 		Kirk Cianwood City 20 Intended to be returned, can be kept if its friendship is high

Dome Fossil only available in Pokémon SoulSilver

Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire

Starting in Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire, for gift Pokémon in the No Eggs Discovered Egg Group, if a Pokémon with Synchronize is leading the party, there is a 100% chance that the gift Pokémon will have the same Nature as the Pokémon with Synchronize, as long as they were not received as an Egg.

Species Received from Location Level Notes
Treecko Professor Birch Route 101 5 First partner Pokémon
Torchic
Mudkip
Pikachu
Rock Star 		Unnamed Pokémon Breeder Any Contest Hall 20 Received after competing in a Pokémon Contest if the player is male
Always female, Ability is Lightning Rod, Contest condition in each category is equally elevated*
Pikachu
Pop Star 		Received after competing in a Pokémon Contest if the player is female
Always female, Ability is Lightning Rod, Contest condition in each category is equally elevated*
Wynaut Egg Unnamed Expert Lavaridge Town 1
(after hatching) 		Obtained with an Egg cycle value of 70
Lileep
Root Fossil 		Devon Corporation Scientist Devon Corporation in Rustboro City 20 Fossils found in Route 111
Choice between Root Fossil or Claw Fossil
Anorith
Claw Fossil
Omanyte
Helix Fossil 		Fossils found by smashing breakable rocks at Mirage spots after battling GroudonOR/KyogreAS
Dome, Armor and Plume Fossils only available in Pokémon Omega Ruby
Helix, Skull and Cover Fossils only available in Pokémon Alpha Sapphire

Aerodactyl
Old Amber
Cranidos
Skull Fossil

Always female, Nature is Lax, Beauty is elevated
Holding a Mystic Water

Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon

In Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, for any gift Pokémon, if a Pokémon with Synchronize is leading the party, there is a 100% chance that the gift Pokémon will have the same Nature as the Pokémon with Synchronize, as long as they were not received as an Egg.

Species Received from Location Level Notes
Rowlet Professor Kukui Route 1 5 First partner Pokémon
Litten
Popplio
Eevee Egg Unnamed Pokémon Breeder Paniola Ranch 1
(after hatching)
Omanyte
Helix Fossil 		Unnamed Pokémon Breeder Fossil Restoration Center in Route 8 15 Fossils purchasable once at Olivia's store in Konikoni City
Helix, Claw, Skull, Cover and Jaw Fossils for sale in Pokémon Ultra Sun
Dome, Root, Armor, Plume and Sail Fossils for sale in Pokémon Ultra Moon
All these Fossils can be obtained in Isle Aphun at Poké Pelago regardless of version

Eevee 		Let's Go, Eevee! only

Gift for showing him five Growlithe
Arcanine Unnamed Beauty Let's Go, Eevee! only
Gift for showing her five Meowth
Squirtle Officer Jenny After the player has caught 60 or more Pokémon

Generation VIII

Pokémon Sword and Shield

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Sword and Shield
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Grookey Leon Postwick 5 First partner Pokémon
Scorbunny
Sobble
Pikachu Unnamed boy Meetup Spot 10 If the player has a Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! save on their Switch
Can Gigantamax, but cannot evolve unless after consuming Max Soup
Eevee Unnamed boy If the player has a Pokémon: Let's Go, Eevee! save on their Switch
Can Gigantamax, but cannot evolve unless after consuming Max Soup
Toxel Unnamed Pokémon Breeder Route 5 Pokémon Nursery 1 Housed in a Luxury Ball
Dracozolt Cara Liss Route 6 10 The result of combining a Fossilized Bird and a Fossilized Drake
Arctozolt The result of combining a Fossilized Bird and a Fossilized Dino
Dracovish The result of combining a Fossilized Fish and a Fossilized Drake
Arctovish The result of combining a Fossilized Fish and a Fossilized Dino
Charmander Leon Leon's room in Postwick 5 After becoming Champion
Can Gigantamax after evolving into Charizard
Type: Null Unnamed League Staff member Battle Tower 50 Received along all 17 of Silvally's memories
The Isle of Armor
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Bulbasaur Honey Master Dojo 5 After completing Mustard's first trial
Choice between Bulbasaur or Squirtle
Has Gigantamax Factor
Squirtle
Kubfu Mustard Master Dojo 10 After completing Mustard's third trial
Porygon Hyde Master Dojo 25 After defeating Mustard at the Battle Court
Has its Hidden Ability (Analytic)
Meowth Diglett Trainer Fields of Honor 5 Find at least 5 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Rattled)
Slowpoke 10 Find at least 10 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Kantonian
Has its Hidden Ability (Regenerator)
Holding King's Rock
Vulpix 5 Find at least 20 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Snow Warning)
Sandshrew 5 Find at least 30 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Slush Rush)
Raichu 30 Find at least 40 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Marowak 30 Find at least 50 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Rock Head)
Exeggutor 30 Find at least 75 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Harvest)
Rowlet 5 Find at least 100 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
If the player's first partner Pokémon was Grookey
Has its Hidden Ability (Long Reach)
Litten Find at least 100 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
If the player's first partner Pokémon was Scorbunny
Has its Hidden Ability (Intimidate)
Popplio Find at least 100 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
If the player's first partner Pokémon was Sobble
Has its Hidden Ability (Liquid Voice)
Diglett 20 Find all 151 of the Hiker's Alolan Diglett
Alolan form
Has its Hidden Ability (Sand Force)
Has 31 IVs in every stat
The Crown Tundra
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Cosmog Unnamed elderly woman Freezington 5 After defeating Glastrier or Spectrier
Poipole Dynamax Adventure Attendant Max Lair 20 Catch at least 5 Ultra Beasts in Dynamax Adventures after
unlocking the "They Came From The Ultra Beyond!" adventure.

Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Turtwig Professor Rowan Lake Verity 5 First partner Pokémon
Chimchar
Piplup
Eevee Bebe Hearthome City 5 After obtaining the National Pokédex
Mew Unnamed Madame Floaroma Town 1 Requires LGPE save data
Jirachi Unnamed Gentleman Floaroma Town 5 Requires SwSh save data
Cranidos
Skull Fossil 		Unnamed Scientist Oreburgh Mining Museum 1 Fossils found by digging in the Grand Underground
Skull Fossil only available in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond
Armor Fossil only available in Pokémon Shining Pearl
Shieldon
Armor Fossil
Omanyte
Helix Fossil 		Fossils found by digging in the Grand Underground after battling DialgaBD/PalkiaSP
Helix and Claw Fossils are more common in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond
Dome and Root Fossils are more common in Pokémon Shining Pearl
Kabuto
Dome Fossil
Aerodactyl
Old Amber
Lileep
Root Fossil
Anorith
Claw Fossil
Happiny Egg Unnamed Hiker Hearthome City west gate 1
Riolu Egg Riley Iron Island 1 Received as thanks for clearing Team Galactic off of the island

Pokémon Legends: Arceus

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Legends: Arceus
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Rowlet Professor Laventon Jubilife Village 5 First partner Pokémon
After finishing the main story, the player can talk to Laventon to obtain the two first partner Pokémon that they hadn't picked
Cyndaquil
Oshawott
Vulpix Keaka Whiteout Valley 40 Received as thanks for finding all 5 of Keaka's Vulpix during request 83 "Snow-White Vulpix in the Snow"
Arceus Arceus Temple of Sinnoh 75 After beating Arceus, it gifts a piece of itself to the player

Generation IX

Pokémon Scarlet and Violet

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Sprigatito
Clavell Cabo Poco 5 First partner Pokémon
Fuecoco
Quaxly
Meowth Salvatore Naranja AcademyS/Uva AcademyV 5 After completing all of Salvatore's classes and storyline.
Koraidon Koraidon Zero Lab 68 Pokémon Scarlet only.
During the battle with the Paradise Protection Protocol.
Set with Poco Path as the met location and the date that Koraidon's Poké Ball was obtained as the met date.
Miraidon Miraidon Pokémon Violet only.
During the battle with the Paradise Protection Protocol.
Set with Poco Path as the met location and the date that Miraidon's Poké Ball was obtained as the met date.
The Teal Mask
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Turtwig Egg Jacq Reveler's Road 1
(after hatching) 		One random egg
Chimchar Egg
Piplup Egg
Growlithe Perrin Mossui Town 15 After completing the Bloodmoon Beast storyline
Shiny Munchlax Kitakami Hall 1 After clearing the Ogre Oustin' minigame on Hard Difficulty.

Pokémon Legends: Z-A

Main article: List of in-game event Pokémon in Pokémon Legends: Z-A
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Chikorita
Urbain/Taunie Lumiose City 5 First partner Pokémon
Tepig
Totodile
Chespin Chespin Académie Étoile 14 Reward for clearing Side Mission #007: A Feisty Chespin
Fennekin Fennekin Magenta Sector 2 14 Reward for clearing Side Mission #008: Get Well, Fennekin
Froakie Froakie North Boulevard 14 Reward for clearing Side Mission #009: A Challenge from Froakie
Spewpa Spewpa Lumiose Museum 9 Reward for clearing Side Mission #021: Spewpa in the Museum
Evolves into a Marine Pattern Vivillon
Bulbasaur Mable Pokémon Research Lab 3F 5 Choice of one
Reward for clearing Side Mission #022: A Call from Mable
Charmander
Squirtle
Tyrunt
Jaw Fossil 		Reg Pokémon Research Lab 2F 20 Fossils purchasable at the Stone Emporium on Vernal Avenue
First revival required to clear Side Mission #027: Restored from a Fossil
Repeat attempts can be Shiny and/or alpha
Amaura
Sail Fossil
Aerodactyl
Old Amber 		Old Amber purchasable at the Stone Emporium on Vernal Avenue after clearing Side Mission #027: Restored from a Fossil
Can be Shiny and/or alpha
Absol Absol Lumiose City 30 After defeating Rogue Mega Absol
Galarian
Stunfisk 		Terri Wild Zone 11 38 Reward for clearing Side Mission #072: Find My Galarian Stunfisk!
Has Terri's OT and ID information
Lucario AZ Hotel Z 50 In the player's room after watching the credits
Has Korrina's OT and ID information
Eternal Flower
Floette
Urbain/Taunie Lumiose City 72 Reward for defeating Urbain/Taunie in the player's 15th Infinite Z-A Royale reward match
Has AZ's OT and ID information
Mega Dimension
Species Received from Location Level Notes
Chest Form
Gimmighoul 		Thelo Rouge Sector 1 5 Received upon starting Side Mission #122: Let's Golden Goooooo
Nicknamed "Chestly", has Thelo's OT and ID information
Melmetal Hyperspace Lumiose 80 Received during Side Mission #193: Dreams of Meltan
Magearna Jett Quasartico Inc. 80 Reward for clearing Side Mission #195: Restarting Magearna
Has Jett's OT and ID information
Hoopa Hoopa Hyperspace Lumiose 80 After defeating Hoopa Unbound during Side Mission #196: The Djinn Unbound

In animation

Pokémon the Series

Species Given to Received from Episode
Pikachu Ash Ketchum Professor Oak Pokémon - I Choose You!
Donphan (received as an Egg) Mr. Shellby and Kimie Extreme Pokémon!
Larvitar (received as an Egg) Marine Pokémon Laboratory workers Lapras of Luxury
Oshawott Professor Juniper A Sandile Gusher of Change!
Scraggy (received as an Egg) Karena Here Comes the Trubbish Squad!
Greninja (received as a Froakie) Professor Sycamore Lumiose City Pursuit!
Solgaleo (received as a Cosmog) Guardian deities A Dream Encounter!
Lucario (received as an Egg) Nurse Joy of Vermilion City Caring for a Mystery!
Blastoise (received as a Squirtle) Gary Oak Professor Oak Pokémon - I Choose You
Arbok (received as an Ekans) Jessie Unknown Prior to Pokémon Emergency!
Weezing (received as a Koffing) James Giovanni* Prior to Pokémon Emergency!
Steelix (received as an Onix) Brock Flint Prior to Showdown in Pewter City
Vulpix Suzie Pokémon Fashion Flash*
Blissey (received as an Egg) Won from a Pokémon Dress-Up Contest All Dressed up with Somewhere to Go!
Comfey Nurse Joy of Melemele Island Alola, Alola!*
Meganium (received as a Chikorita) Casey Professor Elm Prior to The Double Trouble Header
Beedrill Ash Ketchum The Bug Stops Here
Feraligatr (received as a Totodile) Marina Professor Elm Prior to The Legend of Thunder!
Typhlosion (received as a Cyndaquil) Jimmy
Meganium (received as a Chikorita) Vincent
Blaziken (received as a Torchic) Harrison Professor Birch Prior to Pop Goes The Sneasel
Blaziken (received as a Torchic) May Professor Birch Get the Show on the Road!
Wartortle (received as a Squirtle) Professor Oak The Right Place and the Right Mime
Glaceon (received as an Egg) Christopher and Jeannie May's Egg-Cellent Adventure
Mudkip Stephanie Nurse Joy Having a Wailord of a Time
Treecko Stephanie's father
Bulbasaur Gilbert Professor Oak Journey to the Starting Line!
Azurill (received as an Egg) Misty Tracey Prior to The Scheme Team
Piplup Dawn Professor Rowan Following a Maiden's Voyage!
Quilava (received as an Egg) Lyra An Egg Scramble!
Togekiss Princess Salvia Dawn of a Royal Day!
Azumarill Little boy Paul A Gruff Act to Follow!
Haxorus (received as an Axew) Iris Elder of the Village of Dragons Prior to In The Shadow of Zekrom!
Serperior (received as a Snivy) Trip Professor Juniper In The Shadow of Zekrom!
Pansage Cilan Unknown Prior to Triple Leaders, Team Threats!
Pansear Chili Unknown Prior to Triple Leaders, Team Threats!
Panpour Cress Unknown Prior to Triple Leaders, Team Threats!
Delphox (received as a Fennekin) Serena Professor Sycamore A Shockingly Cheeky Friendship!
Chespin Clemont Mega-Mega Meowth Madness!
Chespie Mairin Prior to Mega Evolution Special I
Sceptile (received as a Treecko) Sawyer Professor Birch Prior to Battling with Elegance and a Big Smile!
Charizard Kiawe Kiawe's grandfather Prior to Alola to New Adventure!
Snowy (received as an Egg) Lillie Samson Oak Lillie's Egg-xhilarating Challenge!
Tsareena (received as a Bounsweet) Mallow Mallow's mother Prior to Alola to New Adventure!
Incineroar (received as a Litten) Professor Kukui Professor Kukui's parents Prior to Alola to New Adventure!
Yamper The Cerise
household 		A friend in the Galar region Prior to Legend? Go! Friends? Go!
